description: KAN adaptive mesh refinement: insert/remove knots based on edge curvature to improve representational efficiency while maintaining AUROC.

interpretability.finding: High-curvature edges correspond to nonlinear constraint interactions in the learned feature space. Low-curvature edges are near-linear and benefit from knot removal to reduce parameters.

result_header: WARNING: Experiment 153 has no explicit live inference provenance. Keep this artifact for the research record, but treat its metrics as unverified rather than validated live performance.
